description:
Below I have provided two montages, this person is using walls and no recoil cheats and it is obvious, their reaction times are inhumane as they are always ready for everything. In some of the clips you can see they are tracing a player through the wall and lining up their shots through walls. Whenever they shoot their guns never move. They are also playing on a fresh level 95 account with an 83.4% headshot rate.  The players movement is also a dead giveaway that they are cheating as they move like a player in lower elo. 

Youtube Montages:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r7FpzOYWM-I
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w0x0N6H_MRo

Link to R6Tracker: 
https://r6.tracker.network/r6siege/profile/ubi/lcuyn/overview
